title: Dell India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Dell India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Dell India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Chandigarh operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Dell India:
Dell India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dell India!
